sub_modules.ifft16_bit_reverse: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal mapper used during DIT input loading.
sub_modules.ifft16_addr_gen: Combinational stage and butterfly counter decoder that generates operand addresses and twiddle index.
sub_modules.ifft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for the 16-point positive-exponent IFFT convention.
sub_modules.ifft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point radix-2 complex butterfly with rounded Q1.15 twiddle multiplication.
